task_snapshots.title: 340b-1: Extension Scaffolding & Build Setup
task_snapshots.description:
Create VS Code extension project structure and build tooling. [subtask of 5ff131752f18]

## Scope
- Create packages/vscode/ directory structure (src/, webview-ui/, media/, __tests__/)
- Create package.json with VS Code API, esbuild, Vite, TypeScript, Jest dependencies
- Create esbuild config for extension bundle (Node.js target)
- Create Vite config for webview React app (browser target)
- Create tsconfig.json with strict mode (Pyright strict compatible)
- Create extension.ts with activate/deactivate hooks and basic command registration
- Create GitHub Actions workflow triggers stub
- Create jest.config.js for extension tests

## Completion Criteria
✓ packages/vscode/package.json exists with all dependencies
✓ npm run build successfully creates dist/ with extension.js
✓ npm run test runs jest without errors
✓ Extension loads in VS Code dev host without errors
✓ Activate hook fires and logs to console
✓ All build artifacts are in .gitignore
